title: Silver Metal Latex Balloons, 105pcs, Different Sizes (18, 12, 10, 5 Inch) Chrome Silver Balloon Garland Arch Kit for Birthday, Wedding, Christmas, Bridal, Anniversary Deco
features: Silver Balloons Set:The Silver balloons different sizes packs included 105pcs round balloons(18inch*2, 12inch*30,10inch*30, 5inch*40), 1pcs glue dots, 1pcs ribbon(total of 33 feet), 1pcs decorative strip .The right quantity of party balloons can completely meet your needs for different theme parties, allowing you to enjoy and leave unforgettable memories.

Premium Quality Latex Balloons: The silver balloon garland are made of natural latex, harmless and non-toxic.Helium-filled balloons float in the air to add flexibility to your party. This Latex balloons for balloon arch kit balloon garland decorations are much more durable than regular balloons and after expansion, the silver balloons can stay in good shape for a long time, so you don't have to worry about them bursting before the party is over.

Silver Party Decor:Our Silver balloons for arch garland are widely used for different occasions party, you can effortlessly combining with other colored balloons to create beautiful balloon arch or garland kit to match your party theme.. Such as, white and silver, Silver and gold, silver and black, blue and silver for birthday decorations, graduation decorations and wedding decorations,Christmas, New Year and any themed party inside or outside, which makes your party more special.

Easy to Assemble :105 Pack latex Silver balloons of different sizes are enough to meet your various creative styling needs. We will provide ribbons, glue dots, and decorative strip as tools to help you to assemble balloon arch more easily and effectively. All you need to do is blow up the balloons with air or helium and use the tool to put them together. You will really enjoy this easy, quick and fun activity!

Warm Reminders:The Metallic Silver latex balloons for balloon garland can be filled with air or helium, you can use balloon pump to inflate, but don't blow the balloon too full to keep a good shape. We are dedicated to excellent customer service, if you have any issues, please contact us, and we will provide corresponding solution or ensure a refund until you are completely satisfied
